subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! The trace of thy fragrant pen brought joy to 'Abdu'l-Bahá, for it spoke of unity and concord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان اثر کلک مشکبار سبب سرور عبدالبهاء گردید زیرا ذکر اتحاد و اتفاق
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
